title: Activity
description: GET /activity — what JuiceMount is doing right now (reconcile / drain / prefetch), aggregated for a human-readable status line. Grounded in origin/main (handleActivityHTTP bridge/cbridge.go:2256; activityOperation struct :2242; body is an ad-hoc map, only the per-op element is a named struct). Always HTTP 200. This is the cleanest single source for OpenLoupe's 'what's happening now' inspector line — preferred over stitching /cache-status.live + /spool.

busy.description: true iff any operation is active.

summary.description: Human-readable, e.g. 'Working — uploading 12 files; warming 30 pinned files' or 'Idle — no background work'.

operations.description: Up to three subsystems; absent subsystems are omitted from the array.
